title: capparis breynia
intro: Capparis breynia, also known as the Borneo caper, is a plant species that belongs to the Capparaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Capparis breynia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, stems, and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
